summary: Design and implement a hierarchical server testing framework supporting whole machine, component, and BMC/BIOS layer testing with plugin-based extensibility for server ecosystem products
approach: Build a layered test architecture with core framework, plugin system for extensibility, and three distinct test layers (Hardware/Whole Machine, Component, BMC/BIOS) that share common utilities but maintain independent test execution contexts

design_decisions.decision: Layered architecture with shared core and independent layer plugins
design_decisions.rationale: Allows independent development and testing of each layer while sharing common utilities and extensibility mechanisms
Server ecosystem products can add custom test modules without modifying core framework
Tests at each layer can access context from higher layers (e.g., BMC tests can reference whole machine state)

patterns: Factory pattern for test fixture creation
Strategy pattern for test execution modes
Observer pattern for test result collection
conventions: Plugin registration via setuptools entry points
dependencies: pytest as the underlying test runner
